specs.summary: Defines agent phase mapping — lists sdd-* agent names in R1 table and scenario flows. Must update agent names to score-*.
Agent definitions config spec — defines sdd-doc-writer, sdd-doc-reviewer, sdd-issue-author. Needs agent name updates.

codebase_notes: Key files to modify: (1) .claude/agents/sdd-*.md → rename to score-*.md, (2) .claude/hooks/sdd-*.sh → rename to score-*.sh, (3) .claude/settings.json → add SubagentStop hook + update PreToolUse hook patterns, (4) crates/sdd/src/workflow/mod.rs → update sdd-* agent name strings to score-*, (5) CLAUDE.md → update agent name references, (6) new file .claude/hooks/score-next-step.sh. Workflow mod.rs injects 'default_agent' field with values like 'sdd-reference-context', 'sdd-change-spec', 'sdd-change-implementation' — these all need renaming to score-*.
